subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the Most Merciful! In this moment when 'Abdu'l-Bahá is engaged in utmost supplication and entreaty, prostrate at the Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء رحمن در این دم که عبدالبهاء در نهایت تضرع و ابتهالست و ساجد عتبه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
